title: Chapter 3 Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of Chapter 3 concepts!

questions.question: If an `if` condition fails, which fallback block is executed next?
questions.explanation: The else block picks up if the initial condition is false.

questions.question: Which provides a cleaner alternative to chaining many `else if` conditions on the exact same variable?
questions.explanation: The switch statement is optimized for handling many strict equality checks on a single variable.

questions.question: The code block inside `if (false)` will run.
questions.explanation: If statements mandate that the condition evaluates to true to run the inside block.
